current_suggestion.pitch: Your poker channels (GTO Wizard, GTO Lab, Alderman) are heavy on solver work and GTO mechanics, but Thinking Poker with Andrew Brokos fills a gap by emphasizing poker philosophy, hand reading heuristics, and the decision-making psychology behind deviating from GTO — the 'why' behind the math. The format is a long-form podcast with deep hand history analysis and occasional interviews with high-stakes players and theorists. It complements solver-based learning by training the reasoning layer beneath the outputs.
